use_cases: Displaying user profile information with animated entrance effects on team member pages
Showcasing individual contributors or authors in portfolio and blog layouts
Creating interactive social media profile cards with hover animations
Building user directories with themed, animated profile cards
Adding branded profile sections to landing pages and about sections
ai_summary: An animated profile card component featuring GSAP-powered entrance and hover animations, themed dark/light mode support, and social link integration. Displays avatar, name, location, and bio content with smooth transitions. Uses gradient and glass-morphism styling for a modern, polished appearance suitable for team pages, portfolios, and user directories.
